chemistry.scope_summary: Two substrates demonstrated: allyl-substituted (6a) giving 4:1 mixture of crossed:straight products, and butenyl-substituted (6b) giving single straight product. Both proceed in excellent yields (95-96%) under flow photochemistry conditions.

optimization_table.key_findings: 40 mM solution of 6a in MeCN as the solvent, 254 nm irradiation with a 30 min residence time, producing a 4:1 mixture of products 7 and 8 in 96% yield

light_source.position_relative_to_reactor: externally cooled with water and contained in a metal jacket to protect the surrounding from the UV-light

key_intermediates.description: cyclohexanone with cyclobutyl N-ethyl amine substituent

figures.caption: Scheme 1. Target Sca ﬀ olds 1 − 3 for Library Synthesis | Scheme 2. Precursor Synthesis

figures.mechanism_type: Dean-Stark condensation followed by Boc protection
figures.caption: Scheme 1. Target Sca ﬀ olds 1 − 3 for Library Synthesis | Scheme 2. Precursor Synthesis

key_observations_supporting_mechanism: 96% yield with 4:1 ratio for products 7 and 8

figures.flow_path: reactant reservoir → pump → photoreactor with cooling water jacket → collection vessel
figures.key_information: Schematic shows a continuous flow photochemical reactor setup with external cooling water circulation and what appears to be a UV light source integrated into the reactor design
figures.caption: Scheme 3. [2 + 2] Photocycloaddition Reactions | Figure 1.  Small scale photochemical  ﬂ ow reactor. | Figure 2.  Large scale photochemical  ﬂ ow reactor: schematic overview and complete setup.
Scheme 4. Functionalization Reactions of Sca ﬀ olds 7 and 9

translation_logic.flow_advantage: Enables continuous photochemistry with external cooling and uniform irradiation, amenable to scale-up with throughput >100 g/day
translation_logic.what_changed: Implementation of continuous flow photoreactor with FEP tubing and external UV lamp
translation_logic.what_stayed_same: Same reaction conditions (254 nm, MeCN solvent, 40 mM concentration)
translation_logic.safety_improvement: External cooling and contained UV lamp in metal jacket for protection

figure_descriptions: Large scale photochemical flow reactor: schematic overview and complete setup

conflicts: Pass 3 reported residence_time_min as 40, but figure shows 30 min for 6a - using figure value
notes: Flow-only photochemistry paper with good reactor details and mechanistic schemes. No batch baseline for comparison. Residence time conflict resolved using figure data over text.
